name: MINSHENG ROYAL FUND MANAGEMENT CO - MSR SciTech Investment 3 Year Mixed Fund
summary: MINSHENG ROYAL FUND MANAGEMENT CO - MSR SciTech Investment 3 Year Mixed Fund is a fund managed by Minsheng Royal Fund Management that focuses on investing in companies involved in science and technology with a mixed allocation to stocks and bonds, and a three-year investment horizon. The fund aims to capture the growth potential of the technology sector while managing risk through diversification.
